subject: Update filebeat version to upgrade to python3
commit_message:
Update filebeat version to upgrade to python3

Issue-ID: MULTICLOUD-1203
Signed-off-by: Bin Yang <bin.yang@windriver.com>
Change-Id: Idbedb768ea10a4a29bd6ebc5b1e3ae8bc8d70321

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 2 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Azure 1: Chained-CI build started, max time: 14400 seconds

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

filebeat 7.x has a weird license AFAIK
I think we'll have a waiver for all filebeat 5.5.0

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> 
> filebeat 7.x has a weird license AFAIK
> I think we'll have a waiver for all filebeat 5.5.0

OK, I will abandon this patch
